title: Hiring Teacher at Byju's Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Hiring Teacher at Byju's Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Byju's Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Teacher at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Byju's Digital Technologies:
Byju's Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
